name: add_big_ball
description: Adds a large red sphere (ball) to the scene at the specified coordinates.
signature: add_big_ball(x: float, y: float, z: float) -> dict
source_code:
async def add_big_ball(x, y, z):
    return await add_custom_object('big_ball', x, y, z, body_xml='<geom type="sphere" size="0.06" rgba="1 0 0 1" mass="0.5"/>')
